channel.title: gitpod on Nap Joseph Calub
channel.description: Recent content in gitpod on Nap Joseph Calub

item.title: Using Hugo on Gitpod
item.description: Create the necessary Gitpod files on the root of your repository. $ touch .gitpod.Dockerfile $ touch .gitpod.yml # file: .gitpod.DockerfileFROMgitpod/workspace-fullUSERrootRUN apt-get update && apt-get install -yq hugo# file: .gitpod.yml image: file: .gitpod.Dockerfile tasks: - command: 'hugo server --baseUrl $(gp url 1313) --appendPort=false' ports: - port: 1313 onOpen: open-preview After commiting and merging your code, you can then go to https://gitpod.io/#https://github.com/<YOUR_USERNAME>/<YOUR_REPO_NAME> to start your Gitpod workspace. Optionally, you can also add a Gitpod badge on your README file:
